title: Perfectly Pan Seared Portuguese Chicken Skillet
description: A nutty and snappy Portuguese dish perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring sesame seed oil and a deglaze, all while being keto-friendly.
instructions: Heat the sesame seed oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Add the chicken broth and white wine, if using, to the skillet, stirring to deglaze the bottom.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 400 degrees for 15-20 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
